commit.message:
Make HR character name optional — allow note-only hard reserves

Admins can now HR an item with just a note (e.g. "Guild Only", "Open Roll")
and no player name required. Character field is now optional in both the
dialog (removed required attr) and the JS submit handler. HR badge in the
loot table shows just "HR" when no character is assigned; tooltip includes
the note for context.

Переименовать amvera.yml → amvera.yaml (требование Amvera)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

CFM-11: menu bar arrow key navigation and accessibility improvements (#410)

* feat: add arrow key navigation to menu bar with roving tabindex (CFM-11)

Implement the WAI toolbar pattern for the menu bar: a single tab stop
with ArrowLeft/ArrowRight navigation between items. Uses roving tabindex
so only the active item is in the tab order. Arrow keys are not
intercepted when the filename input is focused.

* refactor: make logo focus ring configurable via appFocusRingIcon (CFM-11)

Remove the hardcoded CODAP-specific LogoFocusRing SVG component. The
client application can now provide a custom focus ring image via the
appFocusRingIcon option. When not provided, a standard CSS focus outline
is used instead. Also uses appName for the logo button aria-label.

* fix: address accessibility audit findings for menu bar (CFM-11)

- Use data-toolbar-item attribute for precise toolbar button selection
  instead of broad 'button' query that could capture child components
- Add Home/End key support per WAI toolbar pattern recommendation
- Make toolbar aria-label translatable via tr()
- Change logo button label from descriptive to action-oriented (About)
- Add aria-label to filename input for screen readers
- Add useLayoutEffect dependency to reduce unnecessary DOM walks
- Add triggerProps to DropdownView for passing data attributes
- Add translation keys for toolbar label, about, and document name

* fix: address Copilot review feedback (CFM-11)

- Add items/otherMenus/languageMenu to useLayoutEffect deps so tabIndex
  syncs when toolbar contents change dynamically
- Use tr() for filename button aria-label instead of hardcoded English

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace Magtheridon quest rings with Magtheridon's Head in loot table

The 4 rings (Naaru Lightwarden's Band, Ring of the Recalcitrant, A'dal's
Signet of Defense, Band of Crimson Fury) are quest rewards from turning in
Magtheridon's Head — not direct drops. Replaced them with a single
"Magtheridon's Head" (item 32385) which is the actual SR item.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

D28-D31: Template values, logic/math values, store items, forEach iteration

D28: flow.returnValue event, addValueDefFromTemplate, flow.addValueDef event
D29: flow.math, flow.compare, flow.not, flow.and, flow.or values; runEventsIf updated to use condition param instead of StatePath
D30: flow.addItem, flow.removeItem events; flow.getItemIds value
D31: flow.forEach event with continuation pattern for normal mode, simple loop for fast mode

Also fixes:
- Fast mode chainId not passed to runEventFastMode (pre-existing bug)
- Fast mode isFast not propagated through value evaluation chain
- evaluateParams in fast mode now passes current chainId (not parent) so values resolve variables on their own chain
- parentChainId added to EventRunLiveInfo in fast mode

Clean up ephemeral files and extend .gitignore

Delete .decky-test/, docs/debug/, Untitled.base, canary.txt, and
docs/planning/TEST.txt — all ephemeral test/debug artifacts.

Broaden .decky-test/ gitignore to match at any level (was bridge/
only). Add docs/debug/ to prevent debug session captures from being
committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add API v1 infrastructure: Sanctum auth, webhooks, Ransack filtering, and admin UI

REST API with bearer token authentication (Sanctum), scoped abilities
(resource:action), and dual-layer authorization (Gate + token). Includes
CRUD endpoints for users, roles, webhooks, settings, and action logs.
Ransack-compatible query filtering with 18 predicates and ILIKE wildcard
escaping. Webhook system with HMAC-SHA256 signing, exponential backoff
retry, and auto-disable after 18 consecutive failures. Admin settings
pages for API tokens and webhook management. Rate limiting, ForceJsonResponse
and EnsureActiveUser middleware. 172 new tests across 14 test files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add mux client batch render tests, expand pool coverage, and fix WebGPU texture format selection

mux_client.rs (+218 lines): added cx-aware batch render changes test
(batch_render_changes_with_cx_zero_pipeline_depth_is_clamped_and_succeeds)
verifying that zero pipeline depth is clamped to a minimum and batch
render operations complete successfully with proper mock server
handshake, SetClientId, and per-pane GetPaneRenderChanges responses.

mux_pool.rs (+47 lines): additional pool test coverage for edge cases
in connection lifecycle and recovery behavior.

webgpu.rs: fixed typo "exceeed" -> "exceed" in texture dimension error
message. Extracted select_view_formats_for_format() helper that properly
generates both sRGB and linear format variants when they differ (or a
single-element vec when they're the same format), replacing the previous
inline logic that could produce duplicate entries when format already
lacked an sRGB suffix. Both WebGpuTexture::new() and
select_surface_view_formats() now use the shared helper. Test imports
updated to include the new function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Data Residency to A-025 with proper body entry. Add A-026 Single Authority principle.
DOMAIN-BOOTSTRAP: Phase 4.11 write architecture design, Phase 5.5 directive authoring
methodology, Phase 5.7 investigation depth note, Phase 7.7 behavioral tuning methodology,
fix line 838 diagnostic labels contradiction. CLAUDE.template: F-1b worked example note,
NTIC investigation depth pattern.

commit.message:
Add hook uninstaller and StreamDeck live monitor script

hooks/uninstall.sh: counterpart to install.sh — removes Decky hook
scripts from ~/.decky/hooks/ and cleans hook entries from Claude Code
settings.json.

scripts/streamdeck-live-monitor.sh: reusable debug tool that captures
synchronized screenshots and bridge snapshots over time for visual
debugging of StreamDeck button state.

Deleted one-off bisect/oracle scripts for a resolved color regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Web API server — register commands, auto-start, Prefs UI

- Register webapi module in mod.rs and lib.rs
- Add auto-start on app launch (reads api_port from settings, binds on startup)
- Refactor spawn_listener() as shared helper used by both auto-start and command
- Add webapiStart/webapiSetToken/webapiStatus to api.ts
- Add API tab in Prefs: port selector, start button, token generate/save, status indicator

REST API now exposed on port 7380 by default with optional Bearer token auth.
Endpoints: GET /api/tasks, /api/flags, /api/tags, /api/views, /api/health.

[docs](trx-rs): add virtual channels design document

Describes the per-rig dynamic virtual channel architecture for SDR rigs:
session binding via SSE session_id, channel lifecycle (ref-counted,
auto-freed on last subscriber disconnect), center-freq conflict rules,
per-channel audio WebSocket and decode SSE, frontend picker UI, and
phased implementation plan.

commit.message:
Spell out IA, remove prose dashes, content polish

- Replace all 'IA' abbreviations with 'information architecture'
- Remove em/en dashes from prose (replaced with periods, commas, colons, parens)
- Keep date range dashes untouched
- Fix double-hyphen date formatting in case studies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

MASTER3: constitutional coding agent, replaces MASTER2

~800 LOC kernel. Result monad, 8-stage pipeline, 7 tools, 5 scan
rules, 6-persona council. Kernel/Philosophy split: every rule tagged
[K] (enforced) or [P] (advisory). Council gated to dangerous tier
and multi-file diffs only. Runtime metrics: decision_latency_ms,
diff_size_lines, rollback_rate.

commit.message:
fix: watchlist metrics showing 0% — add structured metrics-query endpoint

The watchlist hook was calling /api/v1/semantic/query (LLM pipeline) with
a structured payload it doesn't accept, causing silent Zod validation
failures. Added a dedicated /api/v1/semantic/metrics-query endpoint that
queries rm_daily_sales directly with a static slug→column allowlist.
Also batches all metrics into a single SQL query instead of N separate
requests.

commit.message:
fix: warn when openai package missing with fallback keys configured

Without the openai package installed, Groq/OpenRouter/Ollama keys are
silently ignored and the chain runs with Gemini only, giving no fallback
on rate limits. Now prints an actionable error pointing to
'pip install web-research-agent[providers]' both at startup and during setup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: web_research_agent
repository.description: Research implementation exploring dynamic task analysis and multi-strategy synthesis in the ReAct paradigm.  Demonstrates how systems can adapt their reasoning approach based on question structure without hardcoded rules. Practical web research tool with pattern recognition for answer type detection and adaptive synthesis strategies.

v1.1.0: Audit M3 - fix IP/RAM/CPU, add healthcheck, changelog

Corrections:
- IP: 192.168.1.85 -> 192.168.1.113 (real M3 IP)
- RAM: 48GB -> 32GB (actual 2x16GB DDR4-3200)
- CPU: 8 cores -> 4c/8t (Xeon W-2123)
- Primary model: qwen3-30b -> deepseek-r1-qwen3-8b (31.7 t/s)
- nemotron replaced by phi-3.1-mini (nemotron too large for 6GB)

New files:
- CHANGELOG.md: full version history
- requirements.txt: Python dependencies
- scripts/healthcheck.py: service health check
- scripts/start_n8n.bat: n8n standalone launcher

Health: LM Studio OK | GPU 44C | RAM 44% | Disk 778GB free

commit.message:
Claude/code review mobile optimization v r mn n (#302)

* feat: code review, mobile optimization, test infrastructure, and App.jsx refactor

- Test infrastructure: Vitest + React Testing Library (96 tests across 10 files)
- Mobile optimization: 44px touch targets, responsive tables/charts/legends
- App.jsx refactor: 1,259 → ~430 lines (extracted useHabitTracker hook + app-constants)
- Code cleanup: 184 console.logs removed, lint errors fixed, static imports
- UI: button/input h-10 → h-11, responsive dashboard grids, chart heights

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* docs: Mobile UI redesign plan inspired by MyFitnessPal

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* MandalaChart 모바일 최적화: 그리드/셀/버튼/피커 반응형 적용

- 3x3 그리드: gap-4 → gap-1.5/sm:3/md:4, max-w-2xl/md:6xl
- 센터/노드 셀: 패딩 p-1.5~p-4 반응형, 이모지 text-xl~5xl 스케일링
- 텍스트: text-[10px]~text-base 반응형 + line-clamp-2 오버플로우 방지
- 액션 버튼: h-7/w-7 → sm:h-9/w-9 모바일 축소
- 배지: h-4/text-[9px] → sm:h-5/text-xs 모바일 축소
- 헤더: flex-col sm:flex-row 래핑, 제목 truncate 처리
- 브레드크럼: text-xs sm:text-sm, break-words 래핑
- 컬러피커: grid-cols-4 sm:8, 이모지피커: grid-cols-6 sm:12
- 생성 폼: 색상/이모지 grid-cols-1 sm:2 스택 레이아웃
- 목표 상세: 제목 래핑, 날짜 grid-cols-1 sm:2

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* fix: mobile layout overflow and monthly dashboard 100% completion bug

- WeeklyPlannerManager: wrap header/buttons responsively with grid-cols-4
- TrendDashboard: make controls bar wrap on mobile, remove ml-4
- TemplateManager: switch card buttons to horizontal row with icon-only on mobile
- App.jsx: use grid-cols-2 for inputs, hide read-only week period on mobile
- useDashboardData: fix monthly avg calculation to include empty weeks as 0%
  (was filtering out empty weeks, inflating average to 100%)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* feat: mobile-first UX redesign with bottom navigation bar

Major mobile UX overhaul inspired by MyFitnessPal design patterns:

1. Bottom Navigation Bar (BottomNav.jsx):
   - 5-tab fixed bottom nav: 습관, 보드, 학습, 계획, 더보기
   - Slide-up sheets for 학습 (Goals/Mandala/Weaknesses) and 더보기 (Templates/Logout)
   - Active state highlighting with blue accent color

2. Compact Mobile Header:
   - Replaces ~300px header with ~80px sticky bar on mobile
   - Child avatar + date navigation (< date >) + save button
   - Week period and theme shown in compact row 2

3. Habit Tracker Mobile Redesign:
   - Summary stats bar: 달성/전체 = 달성률% (equation style)
   - 7-day horizontal layout per habit (tap circles to cycle colors)
   - Compact color legend (one-line hint)
   - Collapsible reflection and reward sections

4. Dashboard Improvements:
   - Pill-style scrollable tabs on mobile (replaces underline tabs)
   - Dashboard header hidden on mobile (bottom nav handles it)
   - Tab bar sticks to top on mobile

5. CSS Utilities:
   - .no-scrollbar for hidden scrollbars
   - .view-enter animation for smooth view transitions
   - .safe-bottom for iOS safe area

Desktop layout completely unchanged (all changes use md:hidden/hidden md:block).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* Remove unused imports (X from BottomNav, useComparisonData from DashboardHub)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* docs: Overhaul README.md with Mermaid diagrams, version tags, and latest status

- Add shield.io badges for version, phase, tech stack
- Add 8 Mermaid diagrams grouped by section:
  - Architecture: System overview, component hierarchy, view state machine
  - Database: ER diagram, table groups
  - Data Flow: Read/write sequences, dashboard pipeline
  - History: Development timeline
- Update to reflect Phase 5.5 + Phase 6 Mobile UX redesign
- Add release tag table (v1.0.0 ~ v6.0.0)
- Add key metrics summary (38 migrations, 51+ API functions, etc.)
- Modernize project structure to match current codebase
- Streamline setup instructions and deployment guide
- Add security section and table of contents

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

* feat: 5 improvements - dashboard fix, discord timing, auto-save, planner fix

1. Dashboard stats: memoize callbacks, fix mobile layout (min-h-screen,
   footer hidden), remove dead mock functions from useDashboardData.ts

2. Discord notifications: remove per-check notifications, add weekly
   summary notification when all habits are filled. New notifyWeekSummary()
   and calculateDetailedWeekStats() in discord.js. Edge Function updated
   with week_summary embed type.

3. Auto-save: habit color changes trigger 3-second auto-save timer.
   Shows status indicator (pending/saving/saved) in mobile header.
   Uses useRef timer with cleanup on unmount.

4. Weekly Planner: fix empty calendar by removing weekId dependency.
   New getWeeklyPlanByDate() joins through weeks table by date.
   New ensureWeekExists() creates week record if needed.
   Calendar tab shows create-plan prompt when no plan exists.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JggE2bVspaSursWaoY27pG

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: Add CascadeErrorMode integration tests

Add integration tests for all four CascadeErrorMode values:
- FAIL_FAST: Verify immediate failure on saga error
- CONTINUE: Verify collection of errors with successful response
- COMPENSATE: Verify failure after compensation attempt
- DEAD_LETTER: Verify success with errors collected for DLQ

Also add execute_cascade_with_error_mode method to standalone client
to expose CascadeErrorMode configuration to callers.

Tests verify:
- Error mode determines request success/failure
- Multiple sagas behavior (CONTINUE calls all, FAIL_FAST stops)
- Error details captured in cascade_errors field
- Mode comparison showing key behavioral differences

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
